x4freetext: LR-0 reactor at the research centre Rez,
using VVER-1000 type fuel. The special core features a
dry hexagonal channel (apothem 11.7 cm) for sample
scintillation spectrometer was used exclusively to
The SACS averaged in LR-0 spectrum above 6 MeV were
multiplied by a factor of 3.5942 to convert them into
SACS averaged in 235U(nth,f) PFNS as listed in Table 9
